title: Role Drift
concept: When specialized agents slowly adopt similar behaviors or forget their narrow instructions over multi-turn interactions.

exercises.prompt: What is the best way to manage long conversations between AI agents without losing important details?

options.text: By letting all interactions flow freely without limits.
By selectively keeping only the most relevant parts of the conversation.
By summarizing every message from the start.

exercises.explain: The best way is to keep only the most relevant parts of the conversation to avoid confusion and context bloat.

cards.title: Understanding Role Drift
cards.body: Role drift happens when AI agents start to act similarly and lose their specific instructions over time.

cards.title: What is Role Drift?
cards.body: Role drift is when specialized AI agents gradually forget their initial tasks and begin to behave like each other.

cards.title: Like a Team Losing Focus
cards.body: Imagine a sports team where each player has a specific role. If players start ignoring their roles, the whole team can get confused and lose the game.

cards.title: Examples of Role Drift
cards.body: If a chatbot designed for tech support starts giving advice about fashion because of mixed instructions, it's a case of role drift.

cards.title: Role Drift is Not Just Oversight
cards.body: It's a gradual change, not just a mistake. Agents adapt based on interactions, which can lead to interesting, but confusing, outcomes.

cards.title: Visualizing Role Drift
cards.body: See how specialized roles can blend over time between agents.

exercises.prompt: What is a sign of role drift?

options.text: Agents maintain their individual roles over time.
Agents start to lose their specialized functions and overlap tasks.
Agents become more efficient in their roles as time goes on.
Agents communicate less with one another.

exercises.explain: A sign of role drift is when agents start to lose their specialized functions and begin to overlap tasks.

exercises.prompt: True or False: Role drift only occurs when an AI is programmed incorrectly.
exercises.explain: False. Role drift can occur even with correct programming, due to the dynamic nature of interactions.

exercises.prompt: Fill in the blank: Role drift occurs when AI agents lose their _____ and begin to adopt similar behaviors.
exercises.sentence: Role drift occurs when AI agents lose their specialized roles and begin to adopt similar behaviors.
exercises.explain: Agents can lose their specialized roles gradually over multiple interactions.

exercises.prompt: Which scenario best illustrates role drift?

options.text: A cooking assistant suggests new recipe ideas.
A travel agent starts giving tech support tips.
A fitness coach keeps track of physical activity.

exercises.explain: When the travel agent starts giving tech support tips, it shows that the agent has forgotten its original specialized role.

exercises.prompt: In which situation does role drift most likely occur?

options.text: When two agents have clearly defined tasks.
During long and complex conversations between agents.
When agents are shut down and restarted repeatedly.

exercises.explain: Role drift most likely occurs during long and complex conversations between agents, where misunderstandings can accumulate and lead to blended tasks.
